'''yarubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olanzapine|olanzapine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olanzapine|olanzapine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yarubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæribith|yæribith]] || [[word:yæribij|yæribij]] || [[word:yæribish|yæribish]] || [[word:yæribi|yæribi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yarurubuth|yarurubuth]] || [[word:yarurubuj|yarurubuj]] || [[word:yarurubush|yarurubush]] || [[word:yarurubu|yarurubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yarubuth|yarubuth]] || [[word:yarubuj|yarubuj]] || [[word:yarubush|yarubush]] || [[word:yarubu|yarubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yarufbuth|yarufbuth]] || [[word:yarufbuj|yarufbuj]] || [[word:yarufbush|yarufbush]] || [[word:yarufbuf|yarufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yarubuthu|yarubuthu]] || [[word:yarubuju|yarubuju]] || [[word:yarubushu|yarubushu]] || [[word:yarubuku|yarubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yarubuth|yarubuth]] || [[word:yarubuj|yarubuj]] || [[word:yarubush|yarubush]] || [[word:yarubu|yarubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yarubuthul|yarubuthul]] || [[word:yarubujul|yarubujul]] || [[word:yarubushul|yarubushul]] || [[word:yarubukul|yarubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yarubuthuthu|yarubuthuthu]] || [[word:yarubujuju|yarubujuju]] || [[word:yarubushushu|yarubushushu]] || [[word:yarubuku|yarubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yarubuthun|yarubuthun]] || [[word:yarubujun|yarubujun]] || [[word:yarubushun|yarubushun]] || [[word:yarubukun|yarubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yarubuthuoro|yarubuthuoro]] || [[word:yarubujuoro|yarubujuoro]] || [[word:yarubushuoro|yarubushuoro]] || [[word:yarubukuoro|yarubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
